field_values.action_summary: Having gained the respect/status of a chieftain, Carter exits the chamber with Dejah Thoris under his protection, accompanied by Woola.
field_values.emotional_beat:
From tension to a sense of new purpose and protective resolve.

**Likely Visual Coverage Families:**
- Tracking shots following the group as they exit.
- Wide shots showing the scale of the city/environment as they move through it.
- Close-up on the trio to emphasize their new unit.
location_requirements: Exit of the audience chamber / Thark city streets
field_values.camera_intent: Tracking shots following the group as they exit.; Wide shots showing the scale of the city/environment.; Close-ups on the trio to emphasize their new unit.
movement_notes: Lighting transitions from interior chamber to exterior city streets.
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH010_SC005

## Production Intent
Establish the new status of John Carter as a chieftain-recognized figure by transitioning the group from the interior tension of the audience chamber to the expansive scale of the Thark city streets. The sequence must emphasize the formation of a protective unit consisting of Carter, Dejah Thoris, and Woola.

## Required Cast
- john_carter (Rugged survivor/Martian warrior)
- dejah_thoris (Red-skinned Martian noblewoman)
- woola

## Required Environments
- Exit of the audience chamber / Thark city streets

## Continuity Constraints
- Character movement direction during exit.
- Lighting transitions from interior to exterior.

## Beat List
- BT001: Carter, Dejah Thoris, and Woola exit the audience chamber of Lorquas Ptomel.
- BT002: The group moves through the transition from interior to exterior environments.
- BT003: The trio traverses the Thark city streets as a unified, protective unit.
